title: Inclusions & Components
lead: What the Supreme Court has recognised — and refused to recognise — as part of the basic structure, with the constituent cases.

head: Matter
Position
rows: Temporary provision — CA under Art 368 ==not required== to amend it. [[SC AoR Assn. v. UoI (1994)]]
Takes service-matters jurisdiction from HCs and civil courts — upheld. [[SP Sampat Kumar (1987)]] · [[L Chandra Kumar (1997)]]
Permissible per [[Shankari Prasad Singh Deo v. UoI (1951)]].
